faq.label: Knowledge Base
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our treatments and clinic.

items.question: Why are dental restorations cheaper at Crown Dental?
items.answer: Our biggest advantage is our **own state-of-the-art dental lab**. Because we don't pay an external lab, there are no middleman fees — we pass on significant savings to patients without compromising on premium materials like zirconia.

items.question: Will the treatment hurt?
items.answer: Pain-free treatment is not just a slogan for us — it's a core principle. We use the most modern anesthesia techniques and ultra-thin needles. Our doctors take special care to ensure you feel completely relaxed and comfortable during every procedure.

items.question: How long does it take to make a dental crown or bridge?
items.answer: While other clinics can make you wait weeks for a crown, our in-house lab means a zirconia or metal-ceramic crown can be ready **in as little as 3–5 working days** — from impression to final fitting, we're among the fastest.

items.question: What implants do you use?
items.answer: We exclusively use premium, world-brand implants (e.g. Alpha Bio, DIO). These come with a lifetime guarantee and an excellent osseointegration rate (above 98%).

items.question: When should I see an orthodontist?
items.answer: For children, the first consultation is recommended at age 7–8, but **it's never too late as an adult!** Today there are highly aesthetic (even invisible aligner) solutions that can achieve a perfect, healthy smile at any age.

items.question: Do you accept health fund (EP) cards?
items.answer: Of course! Please let our colleagues know before treatment if you'd like the invoice issued to your health fund card.

items.question: How does the AI Quote Analyzer work?
items.answer: If you already have a quote from another clinic (on paper or as a PDF), simply take a photo and upload it to the calculator on our homepage. Our system instantly compares it with our prices and shows how much you can save for the same treatments.

items.question: How can I book an appointment?
items.answer: The fastest way is to use our online booking system by clicking the 'Book Appointment' button, where you can book instantly. You can also call us during opening hours at +36 70 564 6837.

booking.title: Book an Appointment

about.title: Get to know
about.subtitle: Since 1994, we have been working behind the scenes so you can smile freely, at any time, in any situation.
about.mission1Rest: we know that most people don't enjoy sitting in the dentist's chair. We understand — and with us, that fear becomes a thing of the past.
about.mission2Plain: At Crown Dental, we are the opposite of everything you thought dentistry was.
about.mission3: We offer a lifelong partnership: we're with you from your first baby teeth to the moment at 80 when you look proudly in the mirror.
about.story2Part1: The strength of our clinic is our
about.story2Part2: . Since we handle everything internally, we are faster and more affordable.
about.story3Part1: Today we are responsible for the smiles of more than
about.storySince: For your smile, since the very beginning.

allapotfelmeres.heroTitle: Dental Assessment the Crown Dental Way
allapotfelmeres.heroDesc: We map out the condition of your teeth and oral cavity using modern diagnostic tools. Accurate diagnosis, personalised treatment plan.
allapotfelmeres.problemDesc: Many dental problems — cavities, gum disease, bone loss — develop for years without symptoms. By the time pain appears, the treatment is already more complex and costly.
allapotfelmeres.solutionDesc: With modern panoramic X-ray and 3D CT we detect even the smallest changes. A thorough examination enables early intervention.

items.title: Visual Examination
items.desc: The dentist thoroughly examines your teeth, gums, and every part of the oral cavity.

items.title: Panoramic X-ray
items.desc: A single image shows all teeth, roots, and the condition of the jawbone.

items.title: 3D CT Scan
items.desc: Before implant placement we plan treatment using three-dimensional imaging.

items.title: Intraoral Camera
items.desc: A small camera lets you see exactly where and what problem we found.

items.title: Written Diagnosis
items.desc: You receive detailed documentation of your condition and recommended treatments.

items.title: Treatment Plan
items.desc: Personalised treatment plan with transparent pricing and scheduling.

benefitItems.title: Prevention is Key
benefitItems.desc: Early detection is more cost- and time-efficient than complex treatment later.

benefitItems.title: Fast and Painless
benefitItems.desc: The assessment takes only 30–45 minutes.

benefitItems.title: Specialist Consultation
benefitItems.desc: Detailed specialist assessment where all your questions are answered.

benefitItems.title: Modern Technology
benefitItems.desc: Panoramic X-ray, 3D CT, and intraoral camera for accurate diagnosis.

benefitItems.title: Transparent Pricing
benefitItems.desc: All costs are communicated in advance in the treatment plan — no hidden fees.

benefitItems.title: Written Documentation
benefitItems.desc: You receive detailed written documentation to review at home.

processSteps.title: Book an Appointment
processSteps.desc: Book online or by phone at our Budapest or Esztergom clinic.

processSteps.title: Examination & X-ray
processSteps.desc: Panoramic X-ray and detailed visual examination of teeth, gums, and jawbone.

processSteps.title: Diagnosis Discussion
processSteps.desc: The dentist explains the findings and discusses the options with you.

processSteps.title: Treatment Plan
processSteps.desc: We create a personalised treatment plan with detailed prices and scheduling.

allapotfelmeres.ctaTitle: Find Out the State of Your Teeth!
allapotfelmeres.ctaDesc: Book an appointment for a specialist consultation in Budapest or Esztergom!

faqs.q: How much does the assessment cost?
faqs.a: Panoramic X-ray ranges from 5,000–15,000 HUF, and a specialist consultation is included.

faqs.q: Is any preparation required?
faqs.a: No preparation is needed. If you have previous X-rays, please bring them along.

faqs.q: How long does the assessment take?
faqs.a: The comprehensive assessment takes 30–45 minutes.

faqs.q: What if I'm afraid of the dentist?
faqs.a: Our team is patient and empathetic — we explain every step in advance.

faqs.q: Will I receive written documentation?
faqs.a: Yes, we prepare a detailed written diagnosis and treatment plan.

implantatum.heroDesc: A permanent solution for missing teeth — premium implants from our own laboratory, up to 40% more affordable.
implantatum.quoteAnalyzerTitle: Think the quote is too expensive?
implantatum.quoteAnalyzerDesc: Upload the treatment plan you received elsewhere, and the AI will show how much you can save with us!
implantatum.problemDesc: A gap in your smile is not just an aesthetic problem — neighbouring teeth shift, bone recedes. A traditional bridge requires grinding down healthy teeth.
implantatum.solutionDesc: An implant replaces the natural tooth root with a titanium screw. No need to touch neighbouring teeth, and our own laboratory makes it up to 40% cheaper.

benefitItems.title: Lifetime Guarantee
benefitItems.desc: We offer a lifetime guarantee on the implant and a 5-year guarantee on the crown.

benefitItems.title: Fast Turnaround
benefitItems.desc: Own lab = no waiting. The crown can be ready in as little as 3–5 days.

benefitItems.title: Transparent Pricing
benefitItems.desc: No hidden costs. The price given at consultation does not change until the end of treatment.

benefitItems.title: Painless
benefitItems.desc: With modern anaesthesia the procedure is painless and fast.

benefitItems.title: Premium Materials
benefitItems.desc: We work with high-quality Alpha Bio and DIO implants.

benefitItems.title: 30 Years' Experience
benefitItems.desc: Thousands of successful placements behind us. Your safety is our priority.

processSteps.title: Consultation
processSteps.desc: X-ray, 3D CT, detailed examination, and precise quote preparation.

processSteps.title: Placement
processSteps.desc: We place the titanium screw under local anaesthesia. A painless procedure.

processSteps.title: Healing
processSteps.desc: The implant fuses with the bone, providing a stable foundation for the prosthesis.

processSteps.title: Crown Fabrication
processSteps.desc: Our own lab manufactures the crown with digital precision.

processSteps.title: Delivery
processSteps.desc: We fix the final crown. Use it just like your original tooth!

faqs.q: How much does an implant cost?
faqs.a: Alpha Bio and DIO implant placement starts from 190,000 HUF. An exact price can be given after the 3D CT scan.

faqs.q: Does the placement hurt?
faqs.a: No. With modern anaesthesia it is completely painless — many patients say it is easier than a tooth extraction.

faqs.q: How long does healing take?
faqs.a: Osseointegration generally takes 3–6 months.

faqs.q: Why is Crown Dental cheaper?
faqs.a: Because our lab is on-site, you don't pay intermediary fees — that saving is passed on to you.

fogsor.heroDesc: Thanks to our own laboratory we manufacture perfectly fitting, lifelike removable and fixed prostheses, much faster than you'd expect.
fogsor.problemTitle: The Problem: Partial or Complete Tooth Loss
fogsor.problemDesc: Significant tooth loss is not just an aesthetic issue. It makes chewing difficult, distorts facial features, and reduces self-confidence. Ill-fitting dentures irritate the gums and cause discomfort.
fogsor.solutionDesc: Our own laboratory uses cutting-edge technology to create removable, metal-based, or implant-retained dentures. We restore the freedom of chewing and an aesthetic smile.

services.title: Full Removable Denture
services.desc: Complete prosthesis made with aesthetic premium composite teeth.

services.title: Metal-Base Partial Denture
services.desc: Extremely stable, hidden-clasp prosthesis supported by remaining teeth.

services.title: Implant-Retained Denture
services.desc: Maximum stability! Snap-on denture on 2 or 4 implants.

services.title: Denture Relining
services.desc: If your old denture has become loose, our lab quickly adjusts it to the new gum line.

fogsor.benefitsTitle: The Secret to a Comfortable Prosthesis

benefitItems.title: Own Lab, Fast Repairs
benefitItems.desc: Because the lab is on-site, breaks and repairs can often be fixed immediately.

benefitItems.title: Perfect Fit
benefitItems.desc: Immediate consultation between dentist and technician ensures the prosthesis won't irritate the gums.

benefitItems.title: Natural Appearance
benefitItems.desc: We use premium-quality, layered artificial teeth that are indistinguishable from real ones.

benefitItems.title: Fixed Solutions
benefitItems.desc: Tired of removable dentures? Our implant solutions give you stable, fixed teeth.

processSteps.title: Consultation
processSteps.desc: Specialist assessment and detailed discussion of options and expectations.

processSteps.title: Impression Taking
processSteps.desc: We take an anatomical impression with precision materials for perfect fit.

processSteps.title: Try-ins at the Clinic
processSteps.desc: Framework and tooth try-ins to check bite, height, and colour.

processSteps.title: Final Delivery
processSteps.desc: Fitting and delivery of the finished denture, with advice on cleaning and wearing.

processSteps.title: Follow-up
processSteps.desc: A check-up a few days later to make any fine adjustments needed.

fogsor.ctaDesc: Come in for a specialist consultation and let us find the right prosthetic solution together!

faqs.q: Can a removable denture fall out during speech or eating?
faqs.a: Premium-quality dentures fit precisely thanks to suction. If bone volume is low, we recommend implant-retained dentures.

faqs.q: How long does a full denture take?
faqs.a: Because we have our own dental lab, the prosthesis including try-ins is typically finished within 1–2 weeks.

faqs.q: What should I do if my old denture is loose?
faqs.a: Our lab can reline the denture quickly so it fits snugly and stably again.

faqs.q: Will the denture look natural?
faqs.a: Yes! Our laboratory works with premium, lifelike teeth matched to your facial features in colour and shape.

koronak-hidak.heroDesc: Durable and aesthetic crowns and bridges for missing teeth. Thanks to our own laboratory — lightning fast, without compromise.
koronak-hidak.problemTitle: The Problem: Damaged or Missing Teeth
koronak-hidak.problemDesc: Heavily decayed or broken teeth lose their structural integrity. Missing teeth make chewing difficult and can cause neighbouring teeth to drift.
koronak-hidak.solutionDesc: A crown strengthens the damaged tooth; a bridge replaces missing ones. Our own laboratory uses CAD/CAM technology to craft a perfectly lifelike restoration.

benefitItems.title: Ready in 3–5 Days
benefitItems.desc: Our lab is on-site, so restorations are completed in days rather than weeks.

benefitItems.title: Zirconia: 100% Metal-Free
benefitItems.desc: Perfectly hypoallergenic, with translucency identical to natural teeth.

benefitItems.title: 5-Year Guarantee
benefitItems.desc: We offer a full 5-year guarantee on fixed restorations made at our clinic.

benefitItems.title: Digital Precision
benefitItems.desc: CAD/CAM systems ensure micron-level accuracy of fit.

benefitItems.title: No Pain
benefitItems.desc: We work under deep local anaesthesia, so you will feel nothing.

benefitItems.title: Temporary Crown Immediately
benefitItems.desc: You will never be without a tooth — we fit a temporary crown straight away.

processSteps.title: Consultation
processSteps.desc: X-ray, assessment, and precise treatment plan preparation.

processSteps.title: Preparation
processSteps.desc: Under local anaesthesia we shape the tooth for a perfect fit.

processSteps.title: Impression
processSteps.desc: We take a precise impression and place a temporary crown.

processSteps.title: Manufacturing
processSteps.desc: Our in-house technicians design and mill the final zirconia restoration.

processSteps.title: Delivery
processSteps.desc: We try in the finished crown and permanently cement it.

koronak-hidak.ctaDesc: Come in for an assessment and find out which restoration is best for you.

faqs.q: Should I choose metal-ceramic or zirconia?
faqs.a: Zirconia is metal-free and natural-looking — we recommend it for front teeth. Metal-ceramic is extremely strong and excellent for molars.

faqs.q: Is tooth preparation painful?
faqs.a: No. We perform it under local anaesthesia, so you won't feel anything during the process.

faqs.q: Will I have a tooth while waiting for the final restoration?
faqs.a: Yes! We fit a temporary crown immediately, so you won't leave with a gap.

faqs.q: How long does a crown last?
faqs.a: With good oral hygiene, 10–15 years, but it can last a lifetime.

gyokerkezeles.heroDesc: Save your own teeth with gentle, modern techniques — avoid extraction. Fast and safe solution for dental infection.
gyokerkezeles.problemDesc: When decay reaches the nerves inside the pulp, it causes sharp, throbbing pain. If the infection is not treated in time it can spread to the bone, leading to tooth loss.
gyokerkezeles.solutionDesc: During root canal treatment we remove the inflamed nerve tissue, thoroughly disinfect the canals, and seal them hermetically. The pain disappears immediately and the tooth is saved.

services.title: Single-Root Teeth
services.desc: Root canal treatment of front teeth where typically only one canal needs cleaning.

services.title: Multi-Root Teeth
services.desc: More complex treatment of molars with 2, 3, or even 4 canals.

services.title: Old Filling Replacement
services.desc: Removal of a previous, failed or aged root filling and proper re-sealing of the tooth.

benefitItems.title: Pain-Free
benefitItems.desc: Treatment is performed under maximum-efficacy anaesthesia, making the procedure completely painless.

benefitItems.title: Save Your Own Tooth
benefitItems.desc: Nothing is better than your natural tooth! Root canal treatment is the last and best chance to avoid extraction.

benefitItems.title: Mechanical Canal Preparation
benefitItems.desc: We use modern rotary instruments for fast and precise canal cleaning.

benefitItems.title: Lasting Result
benefitItems.desc: A disinfected and hermetically sealed tooth can serve problem-free for decades, even a lifetime.

processSteps.title: Consultation & X-ray
processSteps.desc: We take an X-ray to establish an accurate diagnosis.

processSteps.title: Anaesthesia & Access
processSteps.desc: The tooth is fully numbed, then access to the infected pulp is created.

processSteps.title: Canal Cleaning
processSteps.desc: Inflamed tissue is precisely removed with modern rotary instruments.

processSteps.title: Root Filling (Sealing)
processSteps.desc: Canals are sealed hermetically with a special material to prevent re-infection.

processSteps.title: Final Restoration
processSteps.desc: The tooth is restored with an aesthetic filling or a crown made in our own lab.

gyokerkezeles.ctaDesc: Severe toothache is a warning sign. Don't delay — book a specialist consultation today!

faqs.q: Will root canal treatment hurt?
faqs.a: With today's modern anaesthetics root canal treatment is completely painless. The discomfort is usually caused by the toothache beforehand, which this procedure immediately relieves.

faqs.q: How many visits are needed?
faqs.a: This depends on the severity of the infection. In simpler cases the final filling can be done in one visit. Severe infections may require 2–3 visits.

faqs.q: Why does a root-treated tooth sometimes darken?
faqs.a: Because the tooth loses its living nerve and blood supply, it can discolour over the years. This can be corrected with cosmetic dentistry.

faqs.q: When does a root-treated tooth need a crown?
faqs.a: A root-treated tooth dries out and becomes more brittle. Especially for molars, a protective crown is almost always recommended.

fogfeherites.heroDesc: Achieve up to 8 shades lighter teeth with our safe, clinical whitening procedures. We restore the natural radiance of your smile!
fogfeherites.problemDesc: Coffee, tea, red wine, smoking, and ageing all contribute to tooth yellowing. Uncontrolled home whitening products can damage enamel.
fogfeherites.solutionDesc: We use safe, enamel-friendly materials. Choose immediate in-clinic lamp whitening or our convenient custom tray home system.

services.title: In-Clinic Lamp Whitening
services.desc: Immediate results in 1 hour! A special UV/LED lamp activates the gel.

services.title: Home Whitening System
services.desc: Custom tray made in our lab, perfectly fitting your dentition.

services.title: Professional Scale & Polish
services.desc: The essential first step before any whitening. Ultrasonic descaling and polishing.

benefitItems.title: Enamel-Safe Materials
benefitItems.desc: We use only rigorously tested materials that do not damage tooth enamel.

benefitItems.title: Fast Results
benefitItems.desc: In-clinic whitening delivers a visible, immediate difference in as little as 60 minutes.

benefitItems.title: Long-Lasting Whiteness
benefitItems.desc: With proper oral hygiene the result can last for years.

benefitItems.title: Painless
benefitItems.desc: The procedure doesn't hurt — at most, mild transient sensitivity may occur.

benefitItems.title: Natural Effect
benefitItems.desc: We bring out the lightest natural shade of your own teeth.

benefitItems.title: Custom Trays
benefitItems.desc: Our lab guarantees that the home tray seals perfectly and is comfortable to wear.

processSteps.title: Consultation
processSteps.desc: Shade determination and assessment. We discuss expectations and options.

processSteps.title: Scale & Polish
processSteps.desc: A clean tooth surface is needed for a perfect, even result.

processSteps.title: Gum Protection (In-Clinic)
processSteps.desc: A special protective gel is applied so the whitening agent only touches the teeth.

processSteps.title: Whitening
processSteps.desc: Application of the gel and UV lamp illumination.

processSteps.title: Aftercare
processSteps.desc: Result check and instructions for the white diet.

fogfeherites.ctaDesc: Book a specialist assessment and find out which whitening method gives you the best results!

faqs.q: Does whitening damage enamel?
faqs.a: No. Clinically tested and approved professional materials only break down pigments that cause staining.

faqs.q: What is the white diet?
faqs.a: For 48–72 hours after treatment, avoid staining foods and drinks (coffee, tea, cola, red wine, smoking).

faqs.q: Will crowns and fillings also whiten?
faqs.a: No — whitening agents only act on natural tooth tissue.

faqs.q: How long does the effect last?
faqs.a: Depending on lifestyle and oral hygiene, results can last 1–3 years.

faqs.q: Is the treatment painful?
faqs.a: The procedure itself is painless. Mild temporary sensitivity may occur for 1–2 days afterwards but resolves on its own.

esztetikai-fogaszat.heroTitle: Cosmetic Dentistry the Crown Dental Way
esztetikai-fogaszat.heroDesc: Whitening, veneers, scale & polish — we create your dream smile with modern technology. Because you deserve the best.
esztetikai-fogaszat.problemDesc: Stained, yellow teeth, visible tartar, minor cracks, or an irregular dentition — these all reduce self-confidence. Many people hide their smile.
esztetikai-fogaszat.solutionDesc: Modern aesthetic procedures — professional whitening, porcelain veneers, scale & polish — can restore the natural radiance of your smile.

services.title: Professional Teeth Whitening
services.desc: Up to 8 shades lighter teeth after a single treatment.

services.title: Porcelain Veneers
services.desc: Ultra-thin porcelain veneers — perfect shape and colour.

services.title: Scale & Polish
services.desc: Ultrasonic descaling and polishing for healthy gums.

services.title: Tooth-Coloured Fillings
services.desc: Composite fillings matching the tooth colour — virtually invisible.

services.title: Smile Makeover
services.desc: Comprehensive smile transformation: whitening, veneers, tooth reshaping.

services.title: Gum Contouring
services.desc: Aesthetic correction of the gum line for a harmonious smile.

benefitItems.title: Safe Materials
benefitItems.desc: We use only premium-quality, clinically tested materials.

benefitItems.title: Fast Results
benefitItems.desc: Most procedures can be completed in 1–2 sessions.

benefitItems.title: Flexible Payment
benefitItems.desc: Instalment options available for larger treatments.

benefitItems.title: Personalised
benefitItems.desc: Every treatment plan is tailored to your individual needs.

benefitItems.title: Natural Effect
benefitItems.desc: Our goal is a natural, harmonious appearance.

benefitItems.title: Own Lab
benefitItems.desc: Our own dental laboratory guarantees speed.

esztetikai-fogaszat.processTitle: The Path to the Perfect Smile

processSteps.title: Consultation
processSteps.desc: We get to know your goals and assess the condition of your teeth.

processSteps.title: Treatment Plan
processSteps.desc: We prepare a detailed plan with prices and scheduling.

processSteps.title: Preparation
processSteps.desc: Scale & polish and professional cleaning.

processSteps.title: Aesthetic Treatment
processSteps.desc: Carrying out the chosen procedure.

processSteps.title: Aftercare
processSteps.desc: Tips for maintaining the result.

esztetikai-fogaszat.ctaDesc: Book a specialist cosmetic consultation in Budapest or Esztergom!

faqs.q: How long does the whitening effect last?
faqs.a: Professional whitening results last 1–3 years depending on lifestyle.

faqs.q: Is whitening painful?
faqs.a: Modern techniques are generally painless. Transient sensitivity may occur.

faqs.q: How much does a porcelain veneer cost?
faqs.a: Porcelain veneers start from 120,000 HUF per tooth.

faqs.q: Will the result look natural?
faqs.a: Our goal is a natural, harmonious appearance matched to your facial features.

faqs.q: How often should tartar be removed?
faqs.a: Professional cleaning is recommended 1–2 times per year.

foghuzas.heroDesc: Fast and safe tooth removal using the latest anaesthetic techniques in a stress-free environment.
foghuzas.problemDesc: Severely decayed, broken, or mobile teeth can cause constant inflammation and pain, and endanger the surrounding healthy teeth.
foghuzas.solutionDesc: We always aim to save teeth first, but when that is no longer possible we remove the tooth quickly and gently with the most modern anaesthetics.

services.title: Simple Extraction
services.desc: Painless and fast removal of mobile or single-root teeth that are easy to extract.

services.title: Surgical Extraction
services.desc: Removal of multi-root, impacted, or severely damaged teeth with surgical access.

services.title: Wisdom Tooth Removal
services.desc: Expert surgical removal of partially or fully impacted wisdom teeth.

benefitItems.title: Pain-Free
benefitItems.desc: Deep local anaesthesia guarantees you feel no pain during the procedure.

benefitItems.title: Short Treatment Time
benefitItems.desc: Our dentists' experience means removal is fast, minimising discomfort.

benefitItems.title: Gentle Technique
benefitItems.desc: We carefully protect bone and soft tissue so future implantation can proceed smoothly.

benefitItems.title: Precise Diagnostics
benefitItems.desc: A digital X-ray is always taken before extraction to map root positions.

processSteps.title: Consultation & Diagnostics
processSteps.desc: X-ray and assessment of tooth condition to choose the most appropriate extraction method.

processSteps.title: Anaesthesia
processSteps.desc: Thorough local anaesthesia of the area around the tooth for complete pain-free treatment.

processSteps.title: Tooth Removal
processSteps.desc: Gentle removal of the prepared tooth, maximally protecting surrounding tissue.

processSteps.title: Wound Care & Aftercare
processSteps.desc: Cleaning the wound, suturing if necessary, and detailed instructions for home care.

foghuzas.ctaDesc: Our experienced dentists will help quickly and painlessly. Book an appointment today!

faqs.q: Will the extraction hurt?
faqs.a: You are guaranteed not to feel pain during the procedure thanks to local anaesthesia. You may feel mild pressure or tension.

faqs.q: What can I eat and drink after extraction?
faqs.a: It is recommended to avoid dairy products, foods with small seeds, and hot or spicy food.

faqs.q: When can I brush my teeth again?
faqs.a: You can and should brush your teeth the same evening, but avoid the extraction site to protect the blood clot.

faqs.q: When can an implant replace the extracted tooth?
faqs.a: If the level of infection allows, the implant can sometimes be placed immediately. Otherwise bone regeneration must be awaited, typically 3–4 months.

fogszabalyozas.heroDesc: Modern orthodontic solutions for children and adults. Straight teeth, a confident smile.
fogszabalyozas.problemDesc: Crooked, crowded teeth not only cause a lack of self-confidence but also pose a health risk. Hard-to-clean gaps allow plaque to accumulate, leading to cavities and gum disease.
fogszabalyozas.solutionDesc: Orthodontics guides teeth into their ideal position. It brings not only aesthetic improvement but also restores chewing function and makes oral hygiene easier.
fogszabalyozas.benefitsTitle: The Secret to a Perfect Smile

benefitItems.title: Wide Choice
benefitItems.desc: From traditional metal braces to aesthetic sapphire crystal and invisible aligners — we offer every solution.

benefitItems.title: For All Ages
benefitItems.desc: In childhood we guide development; in adulthood we correct established issues. It's never too late to start!

benefitItems.title: Flexible Payment
benefitItems.desc: We know orthodontics is an investment. Flexible payment plans help spread the cost.

benefitItems.title: Own Lab Support
benefitItems.desc: Removable appliances and aligners are manufactured in our own dental laboratory.

benefitItems.title: Facial Aesthetics Focus
benefitItems.desc: We don't just move teeth — we keep the harmonious appearance of your face in mind.

benefitItems.title: Modern Technology
benefitItems.desc: Digital planning and modern materials shorten treatment time.

fogszabalyozas.processTitle: The Path to a Straight Smile

processSteps.title: Consultation & Diagnostics
processSteps.desc: Comprehensive examination, panoramic X-ray, and digital impression to assess the dentition.

processSteps.title: Treatment Plan
processSteps.desc: We show you the expected result with a visual preview and discuss appliance type and duration.

processSteps.title: Appliance Fitting
processSteps.desc: Precise and painless fitting, with instruction on wearing and cleaning.

processSteps.title: Activation & Check-ups
processSteps.desc: Regular (usually monthly) check-ups to adjust the appliance.

processSteps.title: Retention
processSteps.desc: After the fixed appliance is removed, we stabilise the result with a thin retainer.

fogszabalyozas.ctaDesc: Don't wait any longer! Request a specialist consultation to discuss all your options in detail.

faqs.q: Is orthodontic treatment painful?
faqs.a: The fitting itself is not painful. Mild tension may be felt for 2–3 days after activations.

faqs.q: Can adults start treatment?
faqs.a: Absolutely! Today nearly half our patients are adults. We especially recommend our aesthetic ceramic or virtually invisible aligner systems for them.

faqs.q: How long does treatment take?
faqs.a: Generally 1.5–2 years. Minor aesthetic corrections can be done in as little as 6–10 months.

faqs.q: How do I clean the appliance?
faqs.a: For fixed braces we recommend a special brush and interdental cleaner, which we demonstrate thoroughly at the fitting.

fogtechnikai-megoldasok.heroDesc: In the same building as our dentists since 1994. Premium restorations without compromise — express denture repair in as little as 1 day!
fogtechnikai-megoldasok.teamText1: Crown Dental's dental laboratory did not open yesterday. We have been operating, developing, and integrating the latest technologies continuously since 1994.
fogtechnikai-megoldasok.teamText2: Our greatest pride is our team: some of our dental technician colleagues have been working with us almost from the very first day — nearly three decades.
fogtechnikai-megoldasok.teamWhyTitle: Why Is Having an In-House Lab a Huge Advantage for Patients?

teamBenefits.title: Lightning-Fast Turnaround
teamBenefits.desc: No postage, no days of transport between lab and clinic.

teamBenefits.title: Direct Dentist–Technician Communication
teamBenefits.desc: The dentist can immediately show the technician the patient's individual requirements.

teamBenefits.title: Personal Shade Selection
teamBenefits.desc: For more complex cases the technician attends in person to achieve the perfect colour match.

fogtechnikai-megoldasok.problemTitle: The Problem: Broken Denture, Long Wait
fogtechnikai-megoldasok.problemDesc: When a removable denture breaks, the patient needs immediate help. Most clinics send work to external labs, which can take weeks.
fogtechnikai-megoldasok.solutionDesc: Because our technicians work in the same building, denture breaks, cracks, or relinings can be completed within 24 hours.

services.title: Express Denture Repair
services.desc: Immediate, precise repair and reinforcement of broken or cracked removable prostheses.

services.title: Zirconia Crowns & Bridges
services.desc: Metal-free, extremely durable premium restorations using CAD/CAM technology.

services.title: Metal-Ceramic Restorations
services.desc: Traditional, extremely strong and load-bearing crowns and bridges with porcelain facing.

services.title: Implant Abutments
services.desc: Custom titanium and zirconia abutments for placed implants, with micron accuracy.

services.title: Denture Relining
services.desc: If your old denture has become loose due to gum recession, we quickly refit it to current anatomy.

services.title: Temporary Restorations
services.desc: No one leaves without a tooth! We provide immediate temporary crowns until the final work is ready.

fogtechnikai-megoldasok.ctaDesc: Bring it to us and our in-house lab will repair or reline it in as little as 1 working day. Book now!
fogtechnikai-megoldasok.faqTitle: Frequently Asked Questions About the Lab

faqs.q: Is the denture repair really done in 1 day?
faqs.a: In most cases yes! A simple break repair dropped off in the morning is usually ready the same afternoon or at the latest the next day.

faqs.q: Can I meet the dental technician during treatment?
faqs.a: Yes — this is one of Crown Dental's greatest advantages! For larger, aesthetically sensitive work the technician personally comes to the clinic.

faqs.q: Do you make CAD/CAM prostheses?
faqs.a: Of course. Our lab is equipped with modern computer-aided design and milling units capable of producing micron-accurate zirconia and titanium work.

faqs.q: What does denture relining mean?
faqs.a: The gums and jawbone recede over the years, causing the denture to become loose. During relining, a new layer is added to the inner surface of the existing denture so it fits stably again.

gockutatas.heroDesc: Uncover hidden inflammations with modern 3D CT and panoramic X-ray diagnostics, so you can be healthy again.
gockutatas.problemDesc: Many people don't know that chronic fatigue, hair loss, joint pain, or skin problems often stem from a hidden, symptom-free dental focal infection. Because they rarely cause local pain, they are hard to detect.
gockutatas.solutionDesc: Our clinic uses the most modern panoramic X-ray and 3D CT equipment. We map the oral cavity with tenth-millimetre accuracy.

services.title: Comprehensive Consultation
services.desc: Physical examination, discussion of symptoms, and mapping of foci in the oral cavity.

services.title: Panoramic X-ray (OPG)
services.desc: Excellent overview of all teeth, jaw bones, and the floor of the sinuses.

services.title: 3D CBCT Scan
services.desc: Three-dimensional, highly precise imaging that reveals even the most hidden cysts and inflammations.

benefitItems.title: Immediate Results
benefitItems.desc: X-ray and CT images are produced in seconds; evaluation takes place immediately on-site.

benefitItems.title: Holistic Approach
benefitItems.desc: We don't just focus on teeth — we examine the whole body in the context of focal infections.

benefitItems.title: Painless
benefitItems.desc: The examination and imaging is a 100% pain- and discomfort-free process.

benefitItems.title: One-Stop Solution
benefitItems.desc: Once we find the focus, we can treat it at our clinic immediately.

processSteps.title: Consultation
processSteps.desc: We discuss your existing complaints, symptoms, and medical history.

processSteps.title: Imaging
processSteps.desc: We take the necessary images (panoramic X-ray or, if indicated, 3D CT).

processSteps.title: Specialist Analysis
processSteps.desc: The doctor analyses the images in detail and physically examines the suspicious teeth.

processSteps.title: Treatment Plan
processSteps.desc: If a focus is found, we prepare a detailed written plan for its elimination.

gockutatas.ctaDesc: Request an appointment for a quick and painless focal infection examination and let's find the hidden causes!

faqs.q: What exactly is a dental focal infection?
faqs.a: A focal infection is a chronic, symptom-free area of inflammation in the mouth from which bacteria enter the bloodstream and cause disease at other points in the body (joints, heart, skin).

faqs.q: What are the most common symptoms of focal infection disease?
faqs.a: Common symptoms include patchy hair loss, joint pain, rheumatic complaints, unexplained fatigue, skin rashes, and recurrent sinusitis.

faqs.q: Do I need to come on an empty stomach?
faqs.a: No — fasting is not required for dental focal infection testing or for X-ray/CT imaging.

faqs.q: Can X-ray reliably detect a focal infection?
faqs.a: 2D panoramic X-ray shows most problems. In certain complex cases a 3D CBCT scan may be necessary.

gyerekfogaszat.heroTitle: Fun Dentistry the Crown Dental Way
gyerekfogaszat.heroDesc: Where the dental chair is a magic throne and treatment is a smiling adventure. Let's build your child's confidence together!
gyerekfogaszat.problemDesc: Many children are terrified of the dentist because of previous bad experiences. Fear causes parents to delay check-ups, so milk tooth decay quickly worsens.
gyerekfogaszat.solutionDesc: In our clinic we introduce children to the instruments with great patience, in a playful way. A positive first experience is defining for life.
gyerekfogaszat.kidsSectionBadge: Show This to the Little One!
gyerekfogaszat.kidsSectionTitle: Hi! We Really Can't Wait to Meet You!

kidsFunFacts.title: The Magic Throne
kidsFunFacts.desc: Imagine — our dental chair works just like a spaceship! It goes up, goes down, and is really comfortable.

kidsFunFacts.title: The Magic Wand
kidsFunFacts.desc: We don't have scary machines here. With a tiny magic wand we blow away the tooth gremlins hiding on your teeth.

kidsFunFacts.title: Superhero Gift
kidsFunFacts.desc: At the end of every check-up every brave little one earns a superhero gift!

services.title: Fissure Sealant
services.desc: Sealing the deep fissures of molars to prevent bacteria from settling.

services.title: Milk Tooth Filling
services.desc: Milk teeth need treating too! Painless, aesthetic fillings for little ones.

services.title: Gentle Milk Tooth Extraction
services.desc: After a magic numbing gel, the problem tooth is removed in a flash.

services.title: Orthodontic Consultation
services.desc: Tooth development is worth checking as early as age 7–8 for early detection.

gyerekfogaszat.ctaTitle: Let's Make Dentistry a Great Experience!
gyerekfogaszat.ctaDesc: Bring your child in for a friendly get-to-know-you assessment today!

faqs.q: What age is best for the first dental visit?
faqs.a: Ideally the first visit should take place around 2–3 years of age for a friendly introduction.

faqs.q: Do milk teeth need filling too?
faqs.a: Yes! Decayed milk teeth cause pain and can damage the buds of permanent teeth.

faqs.q: What if the child is afraid?
faqs.a: We never force anything. We work with patience, toys, and distraction.

faqs.q: What is fissure sealing?
faqs.a: Painless filling of the deep fissures of permanent molars to prevent decay.

szajsebeszet.heroDesc: Wisdom tooth removal, complex extractions, and apical resection — in complete safety, with modern anaesthetic techniques.
szajsebeszet.problemDesc: Partially erupted wisdom teeth growing in the wrong direction, impacted roots, or chronic inflammations can cause severe pain and focal infections. Many people postpone treatment out of fear of pain.
szajsebeszet.solutionDesc: Modern anaesthetic techniques guarantee a painless procedure. Our experienced specialist surgeons perform even the most complex oral surgery gently.

services.title: Simple Extraction
services.desc: Gentle removal of severely damaged, unsalvageable teeth under full anaesthesia.

services.title: Wisdom Tooth Removal
services.desc: Expert surgical removal of even fully impacted wisdom teeth.

services.title: Apical Resection
services.desc: Surgical removal of the inflamed root apex, saving the problematic tooth.

services.title: Bone Grafting
services.desc: Pre-implant bone augmentation where the jawbone is insufficient for an implant.

benefitItems.title: Pain-Free
benefitItems.desc: We use modern local anaesthetics, so even the most complex surgery involves no pain.

benefitItems.title: Experienced Surgeons
benefitItems.desc: Our oral surgeon has performed thousands of successful procedures, guaranteeing maximum safety.

benefitItems.title: Modern 3D CT Diagnostics
benefitItems.desc: Procedures are planned with tenth-millimetre accuracy based on 3D CBCT imaging.

benefitItems.title: Safety and Sterility
benefitItems.desc: We apply the strictest hygiene standards in our clinics to prevent infections.

processSteps.title: Diagnostics
processSteps.desc: Panoramic X-ray or 3D CT to see the exact position of roots and nerves.

processSteps.title: Anaesthesia
processSteps.desc: Maximum-efficacy local anaesthesia applied, waiting for full effect.

processSteps.title: The Procedure
processSteps.desc: Performing the pre-planned oral surgery gently, protecting healthy tissue.

processSteps.title: Wound Closure (if needed)
processSteps.desc: For surgical extraction or resection the wound is sutured for faster healing.

processSteps.title: Suture Removal & Check-up
processSteps.desc: We invite you back one week later for a quick, painless suture removal and check-up.

szajsebeszet.ctaDesc: Don't suffer from painful teeth any longer! Book a specialist consultation and trust our experienced surgeons.

faqs.q: How much does tooth extraction or oral surgery hurt?
faqs.a: Not at all! We use the most advanced local anaesthetics, so you will feel only mild pressure or tension during the procedure.

faqs.q: How long is recovery after wisdom tooth surgery?
faqs.a: The wound generally heals within a few days; sutures are removed one week after surgery.

faqs.q: What can I eat after an extraction?
faqs.a: In the days after the procedure, avoid hot, spicy, small-seeded foods and dairy products.

faqs.q: Why is 3D CT necessary for oral surgery?
faqs.a: 3D CT lets us see the tooth roots, sinuses, and main nerve pathways with millimetre precision.
